evolving_demo_message:
Welcome to Logistik Demo!

This demo is evolving and represents a limited version and a work-in-progress of what the game will be at its release. You'll see multiple updates as development progresses. These updates will allow me to test new features, fix bugs, and improve player experience.

Feel free to report any issues or share feedback on Discord, on the Steam Forums or in Itch.io comments for this demo.

I can't promise I will fix everything immediately, but it will definitely be read, addressed and potentially added to my Roadmap :)

Enjoy the game,
Axel "Elanis"
